build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:sidecar && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: http:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; media-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: http:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420; media-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
